stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct if an aircraft is maintaining a constant altitude with the autopilot and autothrust engaged?

options.a: The autothrust maintains the altitude (ALT HOLD) and the autopilot maintains the IAS (SPD).
options.b: The autothrust maintains the IAS (SPD) and the autopilot maintains the altitude (ALT HOLD).
options.c: The authotrust maintains the altitude (ALT HOLD) and the autopilot maintains the TAS (SPD).
options.d: The autothrust maintains the TAS (SPD) and the autopilot maintains the altitude (ALT HOLD).
